caption: A woman wearing black over-the-ear headphones and a purple-and-white striped collared shirt is positioned in front of a light-colored wall. To her left, a window is covered by sheer yellowish-green curtains. A neutral-toned piece of furniture is partially visible behind her to the right. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing as she talks. Her expression remains focused and serious as she looks slightly off-camera. The text "Nancy Ramya" is displayed in a small white font in the bottom-left corner of each scene. As the sequence progresses, there are subtle shifts in her facial expressions and head positioning, but her location, clothing, and the surrounding environment remain constant.
